title: Gatha Falls
tagline: Gatha Falls — heritage city of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: The Gatha Falls (or Gatha Seha) is a waterfall in Panna district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.
overview.description: The Gatha Falls (or Gatha Seha) is a waterfall in Panna district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is the 36th highest waterfall in India.

topPlaces.name: Pandav Falls
topPlaces.description: The Pandav Falls is a waterfall in the Panna district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. About 30 metres (98 ft) high, it is located on a tributary of the Ken River, as it plunges over the falls to join it.

topPlaces.name: Jaruapur
topPlaces.description: Jaruapur is a village in Panna district of Madhya Pradesh state of India.

items.note: The Pandav Falls is a waterfall in the Panna district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. About 30 metres (98 ft) high, it is located on a tributary of the Ken River, as it plunges over the falls to join it.
Jaruapur is a village in Panna district of Madhya Pradesh state of India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gatha Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gatha Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gatha Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jabalpur Airport (171 km) and the nearest railway station is Satna Junction (75 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gatha Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gatha Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gatha Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Gatha Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gatha Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pandav Falls, Jaruapur.
